text.tspan: Cumulative cases until 1st August vs. Rate of confirmed cases in the week
Shown on the y-axis is the average of daily confirmed cases for the week prior to when this chart was updated (see footnote).
Cumulative confirmed cases of COVID-19 per million people before August 1, 2020 | in 193
Current daily confirmed cases per million
Source: Johns Hopkins University CSSE COVID-19 Data – Last updated 24 September, 09:04 (London time)
